creator: se@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Please verify the path configured in /etc/login.conf for the account you  
are using during the KDE login. You may want to put an "echo $PATH > /tmp/p" 
before the "startkde" line, and then verify that the PATH written to that  
file contains /usr/X11R6/bin and /usr/local/bin ...
